options.name: -create_inst_group
options.description: convert failed top sdp groups to instance group

options.name: -deleteOverlap
options.description: delete the cells which overlap with sdp group

options.name: -keepSdpArea
options.description: keep sdp area when resolving overlaps with other instances

options.name: -noResolveOverlap
options.description: don't resolve overlap with column/row cells that specified in setSdpMode, default is false

options.name: -sdpGroups
options.description: only place the specified sdp groups
